name: trace_window_expand
description: 2026-07-18 discoverability regression gate for the time-window expand affordance. On the POPULATED showcase doc (many tasks + milestones) the left/right window-expand ports must be laid out with the pointer parked far from the axis header (they used to be gated on hovering a band whose pixel height shrinks with every row added, which is why the user 'couldn't find the arrow buttons' after placing tasks). Asserts the ports are non-empty, fully inside the alpha capture layer and agreed on by the zone hit test, that each target is at least 18x18 px, that hover resolves to WindowPortL, that a plain CLICK (no drag) really widens the visible range twice in a row, that the ports are still laid out and hit-testable after the rebuilds those two commits trigger, and that PP_PROJ follows the committed window.
